<= div class=3D"flex-1 min-w-0">
=
Cla= ude terminou a resposta

Voc=C3=AA disse: quero que re= aliza uma arte de divulga=C3=A7=C3=A3o com essa grade de curso tecnico por = comptencia em enfermagem, mas n=C3=A3o pecisa colocar a carga hor=C3=A1ria,= somente a grade =E2=80=A6

pdf

quero qu= e realiza uma arte de divulga=C3=A7=C3=A3o com essa grade de curso tecnico = por comptencia em enfermagem, mas n=C3=A3o pecisa colocar a carga hor=C3=A1= ria, somente a grade e o nome do curso

10:56
=

Claude respondeu: Aqui est=C3=A1 a arte de divulga=C3=A7= =C3=A3o!

Reading frontend design s= kill

V

visualize

V

visualize show_widget
=

Aqui est=C3=A1 a arte de divulga=C3=A7=C3=A3o! O lay= out foi feito com um visual sofisticado em tons de azul escuro e dourado, d= ividido em:

  • = Cabe=C3=A7alho destacando o nome do curso e da institui=C3= =A7=C3=A3o
  • = M=C3=B3dulo 1 com todas as 15 disciplinas da primeira fase=
  • = M=C3=B3dulos 2 e 3 com as disciplinas restantes e avalia= =C3=A7=C3=B5es
  • = Rodap=C3=A9 informativo com carga hor=C3=A1ria, dura=C3=A7= =C3=A3o, est=C3=A1gios e dados do registro oficial

Se quiser ajustes de cores, fontes, layout ou adicionar logo/contat= o da escola, =C3=A9 s=C3=B3 falar!

<= div class=3D"text-text-300">

Voc= =C3=AA disse: eu pedi par an=C3=A3o colocar a carga horaria e quero que adi= cone a logo da globaltec e deixe na paleta de cor dela

eu pedi par an=C3=A3o colocar a carga = horaria e quero que adicone a logo da globaltec e deixe na paleta de cor de= la

10:57<= div class=3D"flex items-center">
=
=

Claude respondeu: Vou verificar a logo e as cores da Glo= baltec para ajustar a arte!

Vou verificar a logo e as cores da G= lobaltec para ajustar a arte!

Fetched: Tecnico Global =E2=80=94 = Cursos t=C3=A9cnicos e forma=C3=A7=C3=A3o profissional de qualidade<= div class=3D"grid transition-[grid-template-rows] duration-300 ease-out" st= yle=3D"grid-template-rows: 0fr;">

Encontrei a logo! Agora vou buscar a i= magem para identificar as cores exatas.

<= div class=3D"row-start-1 col-start-1 min-w-0">
Pesqui= sou na web

Peguei o endere=C3= =A7o da logo. Olhando o PDF que voc=C3=AA enviou, a logo da Globaltec usa <= strong>laranja e preto (o =C3=ADcone do globo em laranja com o tex= to "GLOBALTEC" em escuro). Vou recriar a arte com essa paleta e a logo.

=

V

visualize

V

visualize show_widget
=

Pronto! A arte foi refeita com:

  • = Paleta da Globaltec =E2=80=94 fundo escuro (#1a1a1a) com laranja (#E8530A) como cor de dest= aque, igual =C3=A0 identidade visual deles
  • = Logo recriada com o globo estilizado em SVG, fiel ao estil= o da marca
  • = Sem carga hor=C3=A1ria, somente a grade com os m=C3=B3dulo= s e est=C3=A1gios
  • = Visual limpo e profissional para divulga=C3=A7=C3=A3o

Se quiser exportar como imagem, posso gerar um arquivo HTML ou PNG = para voc=C3=AA baixar!

Voc= =C3=AA disse: eu quero essa logo entendeu, e deixe separado o modelo 2 e 3,= n=C3=A3o quero junto

<= /button>
<= div data-testid=3D"user-message" class=3D"font-large !font-user-message gri= d grid-cols-1 gap-2 py-0.5 relative [&_ul]:!space-y-0 [&_ol]:!space= -y-0 [&_ul]:pl-8 [&_ol]:pl-8" style=3D"max-height: none; overflow: = hidden; position: relative;">

e= u quero essa logo entendeu, e deixe separado o modelo 2 e 3, n=C3=A3o quero= junto

10:59
<= div data-test-render-count=3D"1">

Claude respondeu: Entend= ido!

Entendido! Vou usar a logo real e separar os m=C3=B3dulos 2= e 3.

Ver a logo enviada
<= div class=3D"overflow-hidden min-w-0">

Perfeito! Logo com globo laranja, texto "COL=C3=89GIO T=C3=89CNICO" em c= inza escuro e "GLOBALTEC" em laranja/vermelho. Vou recriar fielmente em SVG= e separar todos os 3 m=C3=B3dulos.

=

V

visualiz= e

V

visualize show_widget
=

Agor= a est=C3=A1 com:

  • = Logo fiel ao original =E2=80=94 globo laranja com meridian= os brancos e texto "COL=C3=89GIO T=C3=89CNICO / GLOBALTEC"
  • = M=C3=B3dulos 1, 2 e 3 separados em tr=C3=AAs colunas disti= ntas
  • = Paleta laranja e escuro da Globaltec
  • = Est=C3=A1gios e infos do curso em cards no rodap=C3=A9

Quer algum ajuste de tamanho, layout ou conte=C3=BAdo?

<= div>
Voc=C3=AA est= =C3=A1 sem mensagens gratuitas at=C3=A9 15:50

border-radius: 16px; padding: 0px; ov= erflow: hidden; font-family: Lato, sans-serif; position: relative; } .arte-header { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(26, 92, 122) 0%, rgb= (15, 61, 82) 100%); padding: 36px 40px 28px; text-align: center; position: = relative; border-bottom: 3px solid rgb(232, 180, 75); } .arte-header::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0px; backgro= und: repeating-linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent, transparent 12px, rgba(= 255, 255, 255, 0.024) 12px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.024) 13px); font-size: 20px; font-= weight: 700; color: rgb(232, 180, 75); letter-spacing: 2px; position: relat= ive; } .arte-body { padding: 32px 40px 36px; } .grade-titulo { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 4px; col= or: rgb(232, 180, 75); text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 22px; disp= lay: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .grade-titulo::before, .grade-titulo::after { content: ""; flex: 1 1 0%; he= ight: 1px; background: rgba(232, 180, 75, 0.35); } .modulos-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; m= argin-bottom: 20px; } .modulo-card { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border: 1px solid rgb= a(232, 180, 75, 0.25); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; } .modulo-header { background: rgba(232, 180, 75, 0.15); border-bottom: 1px s= olid rgba(232, 180, 75, 0.25); padding: 9px 16px; font-size: 10px; font-wei= ght: 700; letter-spacing: 3px; color: rgb(232, 180, 75); text-transform: up= percase; } .modulo-lista { padding: 12px 16px; list-style: none; margin: 0px; } .modulo-lista li { font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(255, 25= 5, 255, 0.85); padding: 4px 0px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 25= 5, 0.06); line-height: 1.4; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 7p= x; } .modulo-lista li:last-child { border-bottom-width: medium; border-bottom-st= yle: none; border-bottom-color: currentcolor; } .modulo-lista li::before { content: "=E2=80=BA"; color: rgb(232, 180, 75); = font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.2; flex-shrink: 0; font-weight: 400; } .estagio-card { background: rgba(232, 180, 75, 0.08); border: 1px solid rgb= a(232, 180, 75, 0.35); border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 20px; display: gr= id; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; align-items: center; } .estagio-item { text-align: center; } .estagio-item .valor { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: rgb(232, 1= 80, 75); display: block; font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; } .estagio-item .rotulo { font-size: 10px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55); = letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 2px; } .estagio-disciplinas { grid-column: 1 / -1; border-top: 1px solid rgba(232,= 180, 75, 0.2); padding-top: 12px; margin-top: 2px; display: flex; gap: 10p= x; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; } .estagio-tag { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border: 1px solid rgb= a(232, 180, 75, 0.2); border-radius: 20px; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 10= .5px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); font-weight: 400; } .arte-footer { text-align: center; padding: 0px 40px 24px; } .footer-line { border-top: 1px solid rgba(232, 180, 75, 0.2); padding-top: = 16px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 3px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)= ; text-transform: uppercase; } .plus-sign { font-size: 10px; color: rgb(232, 180, 75); margin: 0px 4px; } .detalhe-top { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; margin-bot= tom: 16px; } .dot { width: 5px; height: 5px; background: rgb(232, 180, 75); border-radiu= s: 50%; opacity: 0.6; } .dot.active { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.3); :root { color-scheme: light dark; --font-serif: "Anthropic Serif", Georgia,= "Times New Roman", serif; } * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } input, select, textarea, button { font-family: inherit; } body { font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "S= egoe UI", sans-serif; background: transparent; } html, body { scrollbar-width: none; } html::-webkit-scrollbar, body::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 0px; height: 0px;= } :root { --p: var(--color-text-primary); --s: var(--color-text-secondary); -= -t: var(--color-text-tertiary); --bg2: var(--color-background-secondary); -= -b: var(--color-border-secondary); } .t { font-size: 14px; fill: var(--p); } .ts { font-size: 12px; fill: var(--s); } .th { font-size: 14px; fill: var(--p); font-weight: 500; } .box { fill: var(--bg2); stroke: var(--b); } .arr { stroke: var(--t); fill: none; stroke-width: 1.5; } .node { cursor: pointer; } .node:hover rect, .node:hover .box { filter: brightness(0.97); } .node:hover text { opacity: 0.8; } input:not([type=3D"range"]):not([type=3D"checkbox"]):not([type=3D"radio"]):= not(form.elicit *), select:not(form.elicit *), textarea:not(form.elicit *) = { width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 16px; background= : var(--color-background-primary); color: var(--color-text-primary); border= : 0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary); border-radius: 6px; outline: no= ne; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } textarea { height: auto; min-height: 80px; resize: vertical; } input:not([type=3D"range"]):not([type=3D"checkbox"]):not([type=3D"radio"]):= not(form.elicit *):hover, select:not(form.elicit *):hover, textarea:not(for= m.elicit *):hover { border-color: var(--color-border-secondary); } input:not([type=3D"range"]):not([type=3D"checkbox"]):not([type=3D"radio"]):= not(form.elicit *):focus, select:not(form.elicit *):focus, textarea:not(for= m.elicit *):focus { border-color: var(--color-border-info); box-shadow: 0 0= 0 3px var(--color-background-info); } select { cursor: pointer; } input[type=3D"range"] { appearance: none; width: 100%; height: 4px; backgro= und: light-dark(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)); border-radi= us: 2px; outline: none; } input[type=3D"range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb { appearance: none; width: 18px= ; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-background-prim= ary); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-secondary); cursor: pointer; tra= nsition: border-color 0.15s, transform 0.15s; } input[type=3D"range"]:hover::-webkit-slider-thumb { border-color: var(--col= or-border-primary); transform: scale(1.1); } button:not(#action-btns button):not(form.elicit button) { padding: 8px 16px= ; font-size: 14px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-primary= ); border: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-secondary); border-radius: var(--= border-radius-md); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, transform= 0.1s; } button:not(#action-btns button):not(form.elicit button):hover { background:= var(--color-background-secondary); } button:not(#action-btns button):not(form.elicit button):active { background= : var(--color-border-tertiary); transform: scale(0.98); } form.elicit { background: var(--color-background-primary, #fff); border: 0.= 5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radi= us: 16px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 0px 4px 20px 0px; margin: 4px 20p= x 24px; overflow: hidden; font-family: var(--font-sans, system-ui, sans-ser= if); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased= ; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out, b= order-radius 200ms ease-out, padding 200ms ease-out, margin 200ms ease-out;= --elicit-border-faint: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)) 25%, transparent ); --elicit-shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } form.elicit :is(button, input, textarea) { font: inherit; } form.elicit .elicit-header, form.elicit .elicit-question { font-family: var= (--font-serif, "Anthropic Serif", Georgia, serif); font-size: 16px; font-we= ight: 400; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--color-text-primary, #131313); } form.elicit .elicit-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; = height: 44px; padding: 0px 16px; border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); } form.elicit .elicit-header > svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: = 0; fill: currentcolor; } form.elicit .elicit-header > span { flex: 1 1 0%; } form.elicit .elicit-body { padding: 32px 24px; display: flex; flex-directio= n: column; gap: 40px; } form.elicit .elicit-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16p= x; } form.elicit .elicit-question { margin: 0px; } form.elicit .elicit-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; } form.elicit .elicit-pill { padding: 8px 12px; border: 0.5px solid var(--col= or-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radius: 9999px; backgro= und: transparent; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #383835); cursor: poin= ter; transition: border-color 120ms, background-color 120ms; } form.elicit .elicit-pill:hover { border-color: var(--color-border-secondary= , rgba(30, 30, 29, 0.3)); } form.elicit .elicit-pill[data-accent=3D"warning"] { border-color: var(--col= or-text-warning, #5a4815); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-warning, #5a4815) 15%, transparent ); color: var(--color-text-warning, #5a4815); } form.elicit .elicit-pill[data-accent=3D"danger"] { border-color: var(--colo= r-text-danger, #7f2c28); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-danger, #7f2c28) 15%, transparent ); color: var(--color-text-danger, #7f2c28); } form.elicit .elicit-pill[data-accent=3D"success"] { border-color: var(--col= or-text-success, #265b19); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-success, #265b19) 15%, transparent ); color: var(--color-text-success, #265b19); } form.elicit .elicit-pill[aria-pressed=3D"true"] { border: 0.5px solid var(-= -color-text-info, #184f95); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-info, #184f95) 15%, transparent ); color: var(--color-text-info, #184f95); } form.elicit .elicit-other { margin-top: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0px 12p= x; border: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15))= ; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-background-primary, #fff); co= lor: var(--color-text-primary, #131313); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-bo= x; } form.elicit .elicit-other[hidden] { display: none; } form.elicit .elicit-textarea { min-height: 84px; padding: 12px; border: 0.5= px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radiu= s: 8px; background: var(--color-background-primary, #fff); color: var(--col= or-text-primary, #131313); resize: vertical; box-sizing: border-box; width:= 100%; } form.elicit .elicit-textarea::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-tertiar= y, #7b7974); } form.elicit .elicit-date { padding: 12px 16px; border: 0.5px solid var(--co= lor-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radius: 12px; backgrou= nd: transparent; color: var(--color-text-primary, #131313); width: fit-cont= ent; cursor: pointer; } form.elicit .elicit-other:focus, form.elicit .elicit-textarea:focus, form.e= licit .elicit-date:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-border-= info, #2a78d6); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--color-background-info, rgba(42,= 120, 214, 0.2)); } form.elicit .elicit-files { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: fl= ex-start; :root { color-scheme: light dark; --font-serif: "Anthropic Serif", Georgia,= "Times New Roman", serif; } * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } input, select, textarea, button { font-family: inherit; } body { font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "S= egoe UI", sans-serif; background: transparent; } html, body { scrollbar-width: none; } html::-webkit-scrollbar, body::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 0px; height: 0px;= } :root { --p: var(--color-text-primary); --s: var(--color-text-secondary); -= -t: var(--color-text-tertiary); --bg2: var(--color-background-secondary); -= -b: var(--color-border-secondary); } .t { font-size: 14px; fill: var(--p); } .ts { font-size: 12px; fill: var(--s); } .th { font-size: 14px; fill: var(--p); font-weight: 500; } .box { fill: var(--bg2); stroke: var(--b); } .arr { stroke: var(--t); fill: none; stroke-width: 1.5; } .node { cursor: pointer; } .node:hover rect, .node:hover .box { filter: brightness(0.97); } .node:hover text { opacity: 0.8; } input:not([type=3D"range"]):not([type=3D"checkbox"]):not([type=3D"radio"]):= not(form.elicit *), select:not(form.elicit *), textarea:not(form.elicit *) = { width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 16px; background= : var(--color-background-primary); color: var(--color-text-primary); border= : 0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary); border-radius: 6px; outline: no= ne; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } textarea { height: auto; min-height: 80px; resize: vertical; } input:not([type=3D"range"]):not([type=3D"checkbox"]):not([type=3D"radio"]):= not(form.elicit *):hover, select:not(form.elicit *):hover, textarea:not(for= m.elicit *):hover { border-color: var(--color-border-secondary); } input:not([type=3D"range"]):not([type=3D"checkbox"]):not([type=3D"radio"]):= not(form.elicit *):focus, select:not(form.elicit *):focus, textarea:not(for= m.elicit *):focus { border-color: var(--color-border-info); box-shadow: 0 0= 0 3px var(--color-background-info); } select { cursor: pointer; } input[type=3D"range"] { appearance: none; width: 100%; height: 4px; backgro= und: light-dark(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)); border-radi= us: 2px; outline: none; } input[type=3D"range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb { appearance: none; width: 18px= ; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-background-prim= ary); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-secondary); cursor: pointer; tra= nsition: border-color 0.15s, transform 0.15s; } input[type=3D"range"]:hover::-webkit-slider-thumb { border-color: var(--col= or-border-primary); transform: scale(1.1); } button:not(#action-btns button):not(form.elicit button) { padding: 8px 16px= ; font-size: 14px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-primary= ); border: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-secondary); border-radius: var(--= border-radius-md); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, transform= 0.1s; } button:not(#action-btns button):not(form.elicit button):hover { background:= var(--color-background-secondary); } button:not(#action-btns button):not(form.elicit button):active { background= : var(--color-border-tertiary); transform: scale(0.98); } form.elicit { background: var(--color-background-primary, #fff); border: 0.= 5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radi= us: 16px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 0px 4px 20px 0px; margin: 4px 20p= x 24px; overflow: hidden; font-family: var(--font-sans, system-ui, sans-ser= if); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased= ; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out, b= order-radius 200ms ease-out, padding 200ms ease-out, margin 200ms ease-out;= --elicit-border-faint: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)) 25%, transparent ); --elicit-shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } form.elicit :is(button, input, textarea) { font: inherit; } form.elicit .elicit-header, form.elicit .elicit-question { font-family: var= (--font-serif, "Anthropic Serif", Georgia, serif); font-size: 16px; font-we= ight: 400; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--color-text-primary, #131313); } form.elicit .elicit-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; = height: 44px; padding: 0px 16px; border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); } form.elicit .elicit-header > svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: = 0; fill: currentcolor; } form.elicit .elicit-header > span { flex: 1 1 0%; } form.elicit .elicit-body { padding: 32px 24px; display: flex; flex-directio= n: column; gap: 40px; } form.elicit .elicit-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16p= x; } form.elicit .elicit-question { margin: 0px; } form.elicit .elicit-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; } form.elicit .elicit-pill { padding: 8px 12px; border: 0.5px solid var(--col= or-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radius: 9999px; backgro= und: transparent; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #383835); cursor: poin= ter; transition: border-color 120ms, background-color 120ms; } form.elicit .elicit-pill:hover { border-color: var(--color-border-secondary= , rgba(30, 30, 29, 0.3)); } form.elicit .elicit-pill[data-accent=3D"warning"] { border-color: var(--col= or-text-warning, #5a4815); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-warning, #5a4815) 15%, transparent ); color: var(--color-text-warning, #5a4815); } form.elicit .elicit-pill[data-accent=3D"danger"] { border-color: var(--colo= r-text-danger, #7f2c28); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-danger, #7f2c28) 15%, transparent ); color: var(--color-text-danger, #7f2c28); } form.elicit .elicit-pill[data-accent=3D"success"] { border-color: var(--col= or-text-success, #265b19); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-success, #265b19) 15%, transparent ); color: var(--color-text-success, #265b19); } form.elicit .elicit-pill[aria-pressed=3D"true"] { border: 0.5px solid var(-= -color-text-info, #184f95); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-info, #184f95) 15%, transparent ); color: var(--color-text-info, #184f95); } form.elicit .elicit-other { margin-top: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0px 12p= x; border: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15))= ; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-background-primary, #fff); co= lor: var(--color-text-primary, #131313); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-bo= x; } form.elicit .elicit-other[hidden] { display: none; } form.elicit .elicit-textarea { min-height: 84px; padding: 12px; border: 0.5= px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radiu= s: 8px; background: var(--color-background-primary, #fff); color: var(--col= or-text-primary, #131313); resize: vertical; box-sizing: border-box; width:= 100%; } form.elicit .elicit-textarea::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-tertiar= y, #7b7974); } form.elicit .elicit-date { padding: 12px 16px; border: 0.5px solid var(--co= lor-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radius: 12px; backgrou= nd: transparent; color: var(--color-text-primary, #131313); width: fit-cont= ent; cursor: pointer; } form.elicit .elicit-other:focus, form.elicit .elicit-textarea:focus, form.e= licit .elicit-date:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-border-= info, #2a78d6); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--color-background-info, rgba(42,= 120, 214, 0.2)); } form.elicit .elicit-files { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: fl= ex-start; gap: 12px; } form.elicit .elicit-dropzone { width: 120px; height: 120px; border: 1px das= hed var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radius: 10= px; box-shadow: var(--elicit-shadow-sm); display: flex; flex-direction: col= umn; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointe= r; background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-primary, #131313) 2%, var(--color-background-primary, #fff) ); color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #7b7974); transition: border-color 1= 20ms, background-color 120ms; } form.elicit .elicit-dropzone:hover { border-color: var(--color-text-info, #= 184f95); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-info, #184f95) 4%, transparent ); } form.elicit .elicit-dropzone svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; fill: current= color; } form.elicit .elicit-dropzone input[type=3D"file"] { display: none; } form.elicit .elicit-file-tile { width: 120px; height: 120px; border: 0.5px = solid var(--elicit-border-faint); border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 10px; di= splay: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1= 0px; background: var(--color-background-primary, #fff); box-shadow: var(--e= licit-shadow-sm); box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; } form.elicit .elicit-file-tile .name { font-size: 12px; color: var(--color-t= ext-primary, #131313); word-break: break-word; overflow: hidden; display: -= webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 3; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; } form.elicit .elicit-file-tile .badge { align-self: flex-start; height: 18px= ; padding: 0px 4px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border: 0.5p= x solid var(--elicit-border-faint); border-radius: 4px; background: color-m= ix( in srgb, var(--color-background-primary, #fff) 70%, transparent ); box-shadow: var(--elicit-shadow-sm); :root { color-scheme: light dark; --font-serif: "Anthropic Serif", Georgia,= "Times New Roman", serif; } * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } input, select, textarea, button { font-family: inherit; } body { font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "S= egoe UI", sans-serif; background: transparent; } html, body { scrollbar-width: none; } html::-webkit-scrollbar, body::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 0px; height: 0px;= } :root { --p: var(--color-text-primary); --s: var(--color-text-secondary); -= -t: var(--color-text-tertiary); --bg2: var(--color-background-secondary); -= -b: var(--color-border-secondary); } .t { font-size: 14px; fill: var(--p); } .ts { font-size: 12px; fill: var(--s); } .th { font-size: 14px; fill: var(--p); font-weight: 500; } .box { fill: var(--bg2); stroke: var(--b); } .arr { stroke: var(--t); fill: none; stroke-width: 1.5; } .node { cursor: pointer; } .node:hover rect, .node:hover .box { filter: brightness(0.97); } .node:hover text { opacity: 0.8; } input:not([type=3D"range"]):not([type=3D"checkbox"]):not([type=3D"radio"]):= not(form.elicit *), select:not(form.elicit *), textarea:not(form.elicit *) = { width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 16px; background= : var(--color-background-primary); color: var(--color-text-primary); border= : 0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary); border-radius: 6px; outline: no= ne; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } textarea { height: auto; min-height: 80px; resize: vertical; } input:not([type=3D"range"]):not([type=3D"checkbox"]):not([type=3D"radio"]):= not(form.elicit *):hover, select:not(form.elicit *):hover, textarea:not(for= m.elicit *):hover { border-color: var(--color-border-secondary); } input:not([type=3D"range"]):not([type=3D"checkbox"]):not([type=3D"radio"]):= not(form.elicit *):focus, select:not(form.elicit *):focus, textarea:not(for= m.elicit *):focus { border-color: var(--color-border-info); box-shadow: 0 0= 0 3px var(--color-background-info); } select { cursor: pointer; } input[type=3D"range"] { appearance: none; width: 100%; height: 4px; backgro= und: light-dark(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)); border-radi= us: 2px; outline: none; } input[type=3D"range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb { appearance: none; width: 18px= ; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color-background-prim= ary); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-secondary); cursor: pointer; tra= nsition: border-color 0.15s, transform 0.15s; } input[type=3D"range"]:hover::-webkit-slider-thumb { border-color: var(--col= or-border-primary); transform: scale(1.1); } button:not(#action-btns button):not(form.elicit button) { padding: 8px 16px= ; font-size: 14px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-primary= ); border: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-secondary); border-radius: var(--= border-radius-md); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, transform= 0.1s; } button:not(#action-btns button):not(form.elicit button):hover { background:= var(--color-background-secondary); } button:not(#action-btns button):not(form.elicit button):active { background= : var(--color-border-tertiary); transform: scale(0.98); } form.elicit { background: var(--color-background-primary, #fff); border: 0.= 5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radi= us: 16px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04) 0px 4px 20px 0px; --elicit-shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); } form.elicit :is(button, input, textarea) { font: inherit; } form.elicit .elicit-header, form.elicit .elicit-question { font-family: var= (--font-serif, "Anthropic Serif", Georgia, serif); font-size: 16px; font-we= ight: 400; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--color-text-primary, #131313); } form.elicit .elicit-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; = height: 44px; padding: 0px 16px; border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); } form.elicit .elicit-header > svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: = 0; fill: currentcolor; } form.elicit .elicit-header > span { flex: 1 1 0%; } form.elicit .elicit-body { padding: 32px 24px; display: flex; flex-directio= n: column; gap: 40px; } form.elicit .elicit-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16p= x; } form.elicit .elicit-question { margin: 0px; } form.elicit .elicit-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; } form.elicit .elicit-pill { padding: 8px 12px; border: 0.5px solid var(--col= or-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radius: 9999px; backgro= und: transparent; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #383835); cursor: poin= ter; transition: border-color 120ms, background-color 120ms; } form.elicit .elicit-pill:hover { border-color: var(--color-border-secondary= , rgba(30, 30, 29, 0.3)); } form.elicit .elicit-pill[data-accent=3D"warning"] { border-color: var(--col= or-text-warning, #5a4815); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-warning, #5a4815) 15%, transparent ); color: var(--color-text-warning, #5a4815); } form.elicit .elicit-pill[data-accent=3D"danger"] { border-color: var(--colo= r-text-danger, #7f2c28); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-danger, #7f2c28) 15%, transparent ); color: var(--color-text-danger, #7f2c28); co= lor: var(--color-text-primary, #131313); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-bo= x; } form.elicit .elicit-other[hidden] { display: none; } form.elicit .elicit-textarea { min-height: 84px; padding: 12px; box-sizing: border-box; width:= 100%; } form.elicit .elicit-textarea::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-tertiar= y, #7b7974); } form.elicit .elicit-date { padding: 12px 16px; border: 0.5px solid var(--co= lor-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radius: 12px; backgrou= nd: transparent; color: var(--color-text-primary, #131313); width: fit-cont= ent; cursor: pointer; } form.elicit .elicit-other:focus, form.elicit .elicit-textarea:focus, form.e= licit .elicit-date:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-border-= info, #2a78d6); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--color-background-info, rgba(42,= 120, 214, 0.2)); } form.elicit .elicit-files { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: fl= ex-start; gap: 12px; } form.elicit .elicit-dropzone { width: 120px; height: 120px; border: 1px das= hed var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); border-radius: 10= px; box-shadow: var(--elicit-shadow-sm); display: flex; flex-direction: col= umn; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointe= r; background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-primary, #131313) 2%, var(--color-background-primary, #fff) ); color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #7b7974); transition: border-color 1= 20ms, background-color 120ms; } form.elicit .elicit-dropzone:hover { border-color: var(--color-text-info, #= 184f95); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-text-info, #184f95) 4%, transparent ); } form.elicit .elicit-dropzone svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; fill: current= color; } form.elicit .elicit-dropzone input[type=3D"file"] { display: none; } form.elicit .elicit-file-tile { width: 120px; height: 120px; border: 0.5px = solid var(--elicit-border-faint); border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 10px; di= splay: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1= 0px; background: var(--color-background-primary, #fff); box-shadow: var(--e= licit-shadow-sm); box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; } form.elicit .elicit-file-tile .name { font-size: 12px; color: var(--color-t= ext-primary, #131313); word-break: break-word; overflow: hidden; display: -= webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 3; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; } form.elicit .elicit-file-tile .badge { align-self: flex-start; height: 18px= ; padding: 0px 4px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border: 0.5p= x solid var(--elicit-border-faint); border-radius: 4px; background: color-m= ix( in srgb, var(--color-background-primary, #fff) 70%, transparent ); box-shadow: var(--elicit-shadow-sm); font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700;= color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #7b7974); text-transform: uppercase; } form.elicit .elicit-file-tile .remove { position: absolute; top: -8px; left= : -8px; width: 20px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; border: 0.5px solid var(--= elicit-border-faint); border-radius: 9999px; background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-background-primary, #fff) 90%, transparent ); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; line-hei= ght: 1; color: var(--color-text-tertiary, #7b7974); display: flex; align-it= ems: center; justify-content: center; transition: color 120ms, background-c= olor 120ms; } form.elicit .elicit-file-tile .remove:hover { color: var(--color-text-secon= dary, #383835); background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-background-primary, #fff) 50%, transparent ); } form.elicit .elicit-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-co= ntent: flex-end; gap: 12px; height: 68px; padding: 0px 24px; border-top: 0.= 5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary, rgba(31, 30, 29, 0.15)); } form.elicit .elicit-skip, form.elicit .elicit-submit { display: inline-flex= ; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 36px; min-width: 80= px; padding: 0px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; white-space: n= owrap; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; transition: background-color 100= ms ease-out, border-color 100ms ease-out, transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16= 5, 0.85, 0.45, 1); } form.elicit .elicit-skip:active, form.elicit .elicit-submit:active { transf= orm: scale(0.96); } form.elicit .elicit-skip { border: 0.5px solid color-mix( in srgb, var(--color-border-secondary, rgba(30, 30, 29, 0.3)) 30%, transparent ); background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-primary, #131313); = } form.elicit .elicit-skip:hover { background: var(--color-background-seconda= ry, #f9f9f7); border-color: transparent; } form.elicit .elicit-submit { border-width: medium;
